name: Designated Business Identifier
description: An identifier for an entity that is not an LEI, used for Counterparty 2 or Beneficiary 1.
optionalityRules: Required for a new transaction report if the entity (Counterparty 2 or Beneficiary 1) eligible for an LEI does not have an LEI, and an LEI has been applied for within 2 business days after the reporting requirement arose (Rule S1.3.1(2)(a)).
valueRules: Must be an ABN, AVID or BIC (Paragraph 129(a)).
